skill.body:
# Asset Lifecycle Management
## Overview This skill covers end-to-end asset lifecycle management within an organizational context. Practitioners can track and manage assets across every stage of their operational life.
## Lifecycle Stages - **Procurement**: Capturing purchase details, vendor info, cost, and acquisition date - **Active**: Deploying assets to departments or employees with assignment records - **Maintenance**: Scheduling and logging service events to ensure asset health - **Depreciation**: Calculating and monitoring asset value over time - **Disposal**: Retiring, transferring, or writing off assets at end-of-life
## Key Responsibilities - Create and update asset records with accurate status and metadata - Transition assets through lifecycle stages based on organizational policies - Ensure all status changes are documented with timestamps and actors - Coordinate with department managers for asset assignment and retrieval
## Related Entities - Asset, Category, Department, Assignment, MaintenanceRecord, AuditLog
skill.description: Ability to manage the full lifecycle of organizational assets from procurement through active use, maintenance, depreciation, and final disposal.
skill.name: Asset Lifecycle Management
